$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: S237 WP6 D1 implementer (commit a258d144) — exports 47→52: 5 new public surfaces from the ontology harness (OntologyCVSchema in lib/ontology/schemas.ts + loadOntologyCVs in lib/ontology/loader.ts + CONTENT_TYPE_VALUES in lib/ontology/content-type-registry.ts + the re-export shim for VALID_CONTENT_TYPES at lib/validation/schemas.ts:41 + one Zod-side surface flagged by knip's strict re-export detection). All five are wired end-to-end; knip flags them because the consumer is a different package than the declarer. Baseline raised to absorb the harness public surface; no code removed. Previously: Post-dependabot PR #58 (45-package bump) + knip 6.3→6.13 upgrade — exports 43→47, types 15→34, unlisted 3→2 from the upgraded knip detection surface.
